name: billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient manual billing causes delays in payment collection. We automate the conversion of legal time logs into formatted billing submissions instead of manual entry of time logs into billing software.
target_audience: billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inefficient manual billing processes lead to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_user: billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient manual billing processes lead to errors and delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient manual billing causes delays in payment collection. We automate the conversion of legal time logs into formatted billing submissions instead of manual entry of time logs into billing software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual entry of time logs into billing software

one_liner: For billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient manual billing causes delays in payment collection. We automate the conversion of legal time logs into formatted billing submissions instead of manual entry of time logs into billing software.
